start.speaker: Emberfox
start.text: A fox of warm ash and ember-sparks circles the roadside stones, waiting to see whether you offer calm or command.

choices.text: Offer a steady hand and let it choose you.
Rest by the roadside fire together.

bonded.speaker: Emberfox
bonded.text: The creature brushes your palm with a flame-warm muzzle and pads into step beside you.

already_bonded.speaker: Emberfox
already_bonded.text: The emberfox flicks its tail, ready to scout and shield the road with you again.

end.speaker: Emberfox
end.text: The fox watches from the brush as the road carries you onward.
